title: lithocarpus obliquinervius
intro: Lithocarpus obliquinervius, also known as the Taiwan Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family that is native to Taiwan. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Lithocarpus obliquinervius has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to protect against infection and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lithocarpus obliquinervius include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Lithocarpus obliquinervius is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
